verification_notes:
Head coach Cody Toppert and assistant staff confirmed via official Go-Go press release (mirrored on OurSportsCentral). Career record (80-58 over 3 seasons) cited in search results — derived from 2025-26 record of 20-14 implying prior two seasons combined 60-44. Final 2025-26 record of 20-14, 6th in Eastern Conference, lost Conference Quarterfinal sourced from Wikipedia summary. G-League playoff bracket details and exact playoff opponent not captured — verify before publishing playoff recaps. Roster reflects end-of-season composition; G-League rosters churn significantly via two-way calls, assignments, and 10-day NBA contracts. Several reserve players have no jersey numbers in source (Christopher Mantis, Akoldah Gak, Damari Monsanto, Trae Hannibal, Alondes Williams) — recommend manual confirmation against official end-of-season roster. Player name 'Tristan Vukčević' uses Serbian diacritic (also commonly spelled 'Vukcevic' in English-language sources); 'Skal Labissière' takes the grave accent. Recent and upcoming games left empty: season ended in April 2026, no current schedule. No formal designated rivalries documented for the franchise. 

ESPN limitation: G-League is not exposed via site.api.espn.com under any URL slug tested (nba-g-league, nba-gleague, g-league, nba-d-league all 404). Refresh script cannot update this KB. Roster, record, and schedule must be manually maintained from gleague.nba.com or the team's official channels.
